item.name: Keycloak
Haal person id op op basis van Keycloak user id.

request.description: Deze endpoint accepteert **geen** request body (geen JSON). Gebruik alleen de `keycloakUserId` in de URL.

item.name: Leads
Add form submission to a lead.

body.raw: {"insurance_type":["What type of insurance do you have?","Private"],"referral_source":["How did you hear about us?","Google"]}

request.description:
Stores form submission data (questions and answers) for a lead.
The form data is logged for processing.

The request body accepts dynamic keys where each key contains an array of [question, answer].

response.body: {"message":"Invalid form data format. Each key must contain an array with [question, answer]."}
response.name: Validation error

item.name: Patient appointments
Get appointments for a patient (derived from Orders).

query.description: Filter appointments. Allowed values: future, past.

variable.description: The Keycloak user ID of the patient.

item.name: Patient documents
Get all documents for a patient (derived from Orders -> Activities (type=file) -> activity_files).

query.description: Optional: limit documents to a single Order id.

variable.description: The Keycloak user ID of the patient.

item.name: Download a patient document (activity file).

variable.description: The Keycloak user ID of the patient.

response.body: {"error":"Invalid API key","message":"The provided API key is not valid"}

item.name: Patient messages
Get all patient messages for a person, grouped by thread.

variable.description: The Keycloak user ID of the patient.

item.name: Mark all messages as read by patient (not employee)

variable.description: The Keycloak user ID of the patient.
